description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design. The headband is padded on the underside and covered in a dark, leather-like material, while the exterior is finished in a smooth, black surface. The ear cups are rectangular with rounded edges and appear to be made of glossy plastic, attached to the headband with metal hinges that allow for adjustment. The ear pads are thick and cushioned, likely covered in synthetic leather for comfort during extended use. The headphones do not display any visible wires, suggesting a wireless design, and there are no prominent logos or branding visible. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear wireless headphones with a padded headband and glossy black ear cups. The design is sleek and comfortable, with cushioned ear pads and metal adjustment hinges.
description_view_0: Front view showing both ear cups and the padded headband arching over the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup and the width of the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ear cups and the continuous curve of the headband.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other ear cup and headband profile.
